title: Rename device - Rename, min chars
scenario: Device name can be changed to a single character via Device Settings > General > Device Name and updates successfully after tapping Done
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Enter a single character (1 byte / 1 char) as the new device name
expected: The device name is updated successfully to the single character name. The new name is reflected in Device Settings and on the Home screen.
